name: project-monorepo
description: Full Stack Project with live auctions, PayPal, crypto escrow, admin UI, and production hardening

scripts.build: npm run -w server build && npm run -w client build
scripts.dev: npm run -w server dev & npm run -w client dev
scripts.start: npm run -w server start & npm run -w client preview
scripts.test: npm run -w server test && npm run -w client test
scripts.lint: npm run -w server lint && npm run -w client lint
